report.bugSummary: Research copy actions should copy selected report data without undefined values.
observedFacts: Record rec_A5_COPY_002 includes the term Copy Boundary Beacon.
The report has two evidence entries for count rendering.
assumptions: Clipboard writes are observable through browser automation.
The research directory path is exposed only through the dashboard copy-dir action.
analysis: Copy path should use canonicalPath from the selected report.
Copy content should use the rendered readable report body.
likelyCauses: Missing selected detail state can cause copy path to write undefined.
Copy content can fail if the reader body is not populated before clicking.
recommendedFixes: Load detail state before enabling copy controls.
Keep copy buttons attached to the currently selected report detail.
nextActions: Reload reports and ensure the filter state remains intentional.
report.name: source-copy-boundary
report.markdown:
# Selected Bug Research Report

Copy Boundary Beacon must remain untranslated and copyable.

report.bugSummary: Dashboard source values and report body must remain readable during QA validation.
observedFacts: Record rec_A5_LAYOUT_001 contains product-owned text Sentinel Alpha source text.
The report includes structured sections used by the dashboard reader.
assumptions: The dashboard reads this file from the isolated A5 research directory.
Language switching should only translate dashboard chrome, not report content.
analysis: The seeded content exercises long text, evidence metadata, and source-controlled words.
A selected report should keep the same canonical path and selected record id in the reader.
likelyCauses: A reader rendering regression could drop structured arrays.
A broad translation pass could accidentally modify report body text.
recommendedFixes: Render report sections from source JSON without applying dashboard i18n dictionaries.
Keep copy actions wired to canonical path and body text after selection changes.
risks: Long report snippet risk visible in list
nextActions: Validate report selection, copy path, copy body, search, and reload behavior.
Verify Sentinel Alpha source marker remains unchanged after language switching.

evidence.excerpt: Seeded A5 local report for browser-visible research validation.

report.name: dashboard-layout-regression
report.markdown:
# Selected Bug Research Report

## Observed Facts

- Sentinel Alpha source text is intentionally untranslated.

## Recommended Fixes

- Preserve source-owned report content.
